title: Test Process - Blog Post Approval
subtitle: Genehmigung und Veröffentlichung von Blog-Inhalten
description: This process handles the approval and publication of blog posts in Notion and on our website.

steps.title: Content Draft Creation
steps.description: Team member creates a blog post draft in Notion

steps.title: Internal Review
steps.description: Content is reviewed for quality, accuracy, and brand alignment

steps.title: Website Publication
steps.description: Approved content is published to the website

mermaidDiagram:
flowchart TD
  A0["🚀 Start: Prozess"]:::processStart
  B0["📋 Content Draft Creation"]:::process
  A0 --> B0
  C0["📋 Internal Review"]:::process
  B0 --> C0
  D0["📋 Approval Decision"]:::process
  C0 --> D0
  E0["✅ Website Publication"]:::process
  D0 --> E0
  F0["🎉 Abgeschlossen"]:::processEnd
  E0 --> F0

  classDef processStart fill:#1B3A6B,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff,font-weight:bold
  classDef processEnd fill:#1B3A6B,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff,font-weight:bold
  classDef process fill:#0C2340,stroke:#333,stroke-width:1.5px,color:#fff
  classDef substep fill:#6B7280,stroke:#333,stroke-width:1px,color:#fff,font-size:12px
  classDef decision fill:#00A68B,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff
